evals.prompt: how much has this session cost me so far?
evals.expected_output: A formatted display of session cost and related metrics

evals.prompt: show me session stats -- lines written, turns, cost, everything
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive formatted table of all session metrics

evals.prompt: I feel like I've been going back and forth too much. How many API turns have there been and when did I start actually editing code?
evals.expected_output: Focused display of turns-to-edit and API turns metrics with context
